overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a highway overpass during golden hour. The character approaches and passes through a concrete underpass with graffiti, with futuristic city holograms visible in the distance when looking over the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overpass approach with rocky desert terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the massive concrete overpass structure ahead

notable_agents.action: cars passing by on the highway to the left

entered.detail: massive brutalist concrete overpass with weathered surfaces spanning across the highway
multi-lane asphalt highway with vehicles traveling in both directions
tall concrete safety barrier separating the sidewalk from the cliff edge
reddish-brown rocky desert cliffs rising beside the highway
scattered garbage bags and litter along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a multi-lane highway, approaching a massive brutalist overpass structure. The setting sun casts long shadows across the scene, with rocky desert cliffs visible on the left and vehicles passing by on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge overlook with panoramic view of futuristic city

events.description: camera pans right to look over the railing at the futuristic cityscape in the valley below

agents.ego_description: walking while turning to observe the sprawling futuristic city with holographic towers visible over the barrier

entered.detail: dense futuristic city with towering skyscrapers and industrial structures visible in the valley
tall holographic advertisement towers glowing with blue light above the city

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the overpass, the camera pans right to reveal a breathtaking view of a futuristic cityscape with holographic towers in the distance. The concrete overpass looms larger ahead while the character continues walking along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with graffiti-covered concrete walls

events.description: entering the covered underpass beneath the concrete overpass structure
transition from bright golden hour sunlight to shadowed interior with fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass with graffiti-covered walls and overhead fluorescent lighting

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
underside of the overpass with visible concrete beams and fluorescent light strips
linear blue-white fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the underpass ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadowy underpass beneath the concrete structure, where the lighting shifts to artificial fluorescent strips. The walls are covered in graffiti, and the open sky and city views are blocked by the overhead concrete deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway continuing through rocky desert landscape

events.description: exiting the underpass back into open air and sunlight
emerging from shadow back into bright golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the overpass with vehicles passing by on the left

notable_agents.action: police car with flashing lights driving past on the highway

entered.detail: reddish desert rock formations returning to view on the left side
low green industrial structure visible ahead along the highway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass back into the warm golden hour sunlight, with the rocky desert cliffs reappearing on the left. The highway continues ahead toward a green industrial building, with moderate traffic including a police car passing by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a highway overpass that transitions from a sun-drenched desert vista into a shadowed urban tunnel before returning to the golden hour light. It begins with a walk along a concrete sidewalk beside a multi-lane highway, where the setting sun casts long shadows against rocky desert cliffs. As the camera pans right to reveal a distant futuristic cityscape filled with holographic towers, the massive brutalist structure of an overpass looms larger ahead. The scene then shifts abruptly into the dim, artificial glow of the underpass, where the open sky is replaced by concrete ceilings and graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows back into the warm sunlight, passing a police car on the highway as the path leads toward a green industrial building.
